experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Designed and implemented end-to-end multi-channel B2B order automation system using object-oriented programming (Python, React) with webhook integrations, WhatsApp, email, and phone channels; deployed across 7 enterprise clients processing 1,000+ orders

Developed React and Python internal tooling suite for operations team: Intercom ticketing system (5+ min saved per request, 50+ customers), ERP sales order interface, and AWS S3 file storage managing 250+ attachments

Engineered automated validation layer with human-in-the-loop QA to handle edge cases; applied algorithmic prompt optimization and vector-store correction memory, improving precision across 1,000+ production orders

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Built Python abstraction layer over Grafanalib on 3-person engineering team, reducing code complexity by 83% (30+ lines to 5) through algorithmic refactoring and data structure optimization
Migrated 7+ legacy monitoring dashboards across 3 production Grafana environments with comprehensive unit test coverage ensuring data integrity and system reliability

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Developing full-stack professor review platform for 30,000+ students using TypeScript, React, Node.js, and Drizzle ORM with focus on scalable data structures and efficient algorithms
Implemented review submission flow and Python GraphQL webscraper for automated course data ingestion; delivered features across agile sprint cycles with version control via Git

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Linguistics

skills.Frameworks & Libraries: React.js, Node.js, FastAPI, Spring Boot, Flask, Tailwind CSS
skills.Developer Tools: Git, GitHub Actions, Docker, AWS (EC2/S3), GCP, PostgreSQL, Redis, Linux

projects.name: Internship Matcher (React + TypeScript, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3)
bullets: Architected and deployed full-stack application at internshipmatcher.com: React + TypeScript frontend, FastAPI backend, multi-tier data layer (PostgreSQL for relational data, Redis for caching, AWS S3 for storage), and Clerk JWT authentication via JWKS

Designed dual-model pipeline with algorithmic re-ranking (fast skill extraction, deep top-30-to-top-10 ranking) achieving 95%+ accuracy; implemented server-sent events for real-time progress streaming to React frontend
Optimized parallel processing of 30+ positions with 52% latency reduction (270s to 130s) through dynamic batching algorithms and prompt caching strategies

projects.name: Sleep-PSG Scoring (React, FastAPI, MNE, Scikit-Learn, Redis, WebSockets)
bullets: Built automated sleep-stage classification system with 98% time reduction (2+ hrs to under 2 min) and 83% balanced accuracy using machine learning algorithms validated against clinician-labeled Sleep-EDF dataset
Implemented asynchronous EEG processing pipeline (Redis + ARQ): distributed EDF parsing, spectral feature extraction with optimized data structures, and Scikit-Learn classifiers per patient
Developed sub-10ms WebSocket streaming to React dashboard rendering live EEG waveforms and hypnograms for quality assurance review

projects.name: Cold Leads Agent (FastAPI, Cal.com, Postgres)
bullets: Engineered and deployed autonomous lead-qualification SMS system for Bay Area real estate client: finite state machine pipeline with intent classification algorithms, debounce logic, and automated Cal.com booking of qualified leads
Integrated multi-service architecture: HMAC-signed webhook validation, Cal.com v2 booking API, SendGrid escalation; async Postgres with Alembic schema migrations and APScheduler for job orchestration
Deployed to production processing qualified leads with Cal.com auto-booking, saving ~5 hrs/week of manual outreach through algorithmic automation
